item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: {"status":"continue","judgment":"partially-confirmed","observation":"The Still Guest remains approaching on the right with bearingRadians=1.743 and beamContact=false. The turn-right action produced no movement, but reduced the prior positive bearing from 2.920 to 1.743, indicating rotation toward the encounter.","trend":"Turning right is progressively aligning the flashlight toward the encounter, but the beam has not contacted it yet; visual luminance remains unreadable.","reasoningSummary":"Debug state confirms continued exploration and an active first encounter. Rightward rotation improved alignment without advancing distance, so another bounded turn-right is appropriate before holding the beam. Screenshot readability is insufficient for primary visual confirmation.","evidence":["expedition.phase=exploring","activeEncounter.id=encounter-1-still-guest","activeEncounter.state=approaching","activeEncounter.bearingRadians=1.7434537760764082","activeEncounter.beamContact=false","activeEncounter.distance=12.976170000000002","movementDelta=0","prior bearingRadians=2.9200207760764085","reportStatus=failed","luminance.readable=false"],"historyCallIds":["call-0002"],"nextActionProfile":"turn-right","nextHypothesis":"One more right turn will bring the Still Guest's positive bearing closer to the flashlight beam; then hold-beam should be attempted when beamContact becomes true or the bearing is within beam width.","confidence":0.91,"stopReason":null}
